enphaseR 0.1.0
  • Get started
  • Reference

Get a summary of one system's current status and lifetime production

enphase_summary.Rd

Get a summary of one system's current status and lifetime production

Usage

enphase_summary(system_id, config_dir = NULL)

Arguments

system_id

The system's numeric ID, from enphase_systems().

config_dir

Directory for credential and token files. Defaults to the ENPHASER_CONFIG_DIR environment variable if set, otherwise tools::R_user_dir("enphaseR", "config").

Value

A one-row tibble of the system's summary fields, such as current_power, energy_today, energy_lifetime, and status.

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
enphase_summary(system_id = 1234567)
} # }
